title: Default
objective: Start the default workstream for Meeting Ingest.
status_summary: Closed the legacy-source dedup safety gap: sources whose hash appears only in a deprecated three-field ledger record now fail closed with legacy_source_unresolved (exit 12, no side effects) at ingest, provider-request, and reconcile; reconcile preflights all inbox sources before repairs after an independent review caught partial-mutation ordering. 386 tests pass. Committed and pushed to main as three commits: readiness compatibility hotfix (6ba9543), legacy dedup guard (ea0c473), context checkpoint (7b0ff13). Post-commit hook refreshed the global uv tool from main (known Task 8 retirement target). Starting Approved Runtime Task 7 design.
blockers: No corpus adoption or mutation is authorized; a deterministic fingerprinted adoption plan requires later owner approval.
open_questions: Decide when to begin the separately planned Semantic Integrity Guardrails work after the Approved Runtime track.
next_actions: Implement Task 7 provenance persistence: ledger 2.0 + signal 1.2 + markdown 1.1 + run summary 1.1 + playbook provenance writers with phase-2 adoption and write-time producer linkage, then doctor/readiness checks, tests, independent review, commit.
continuation_hint: Next: Implement Task 7 provenance persistence: ledger 2.0 + signal 1.2 + markdown 1.1 + run summary 1.1 + playbook provenance writers with phase-2 adoption and write-time producer linkage, then doctor/readiness checks, tests, independent review, commit.
